mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( -- 현재고가 있는 제품 LOT 목록 SELECT 1 FROM product_inbound pi JOIN product p ON pi.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN product_outbound po ON pi.product_id = po.product_id AND pi.lot_no = po.lot_no
p.product_name IN ('돼지국밥', '순대국밥', '한우곰탕')
AND (p.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pi.lot_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND pi.reg_date >= #{startDate}
AND pi.reg_date <= #{endDate}
GROUP BY pi.product_id, pi.lot_no HAVING GREATEST(SUM(COALESCE(pi.inbound_qty, 0)) - SUM(COALESCE(po.outbound_qty, 0)), 0) > 0
UNION ALL
-- 현재고가 0이고, 다른 재고가 없는 제품의 최신 1건 SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT pi.product_id, p.product_name, pi.lot_no, pi.reg_date, GREATEST(SUM(COALESCE(pi.inbound_qty, 0)) - SUM(COALESCE(po.outbound_qty, 0)), 0) AS stock_qty, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.product_name ORDER BY pi.reg_date DESC) AS rn FROM product_inbound pi JOIN product p ON pi.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN product_outbound po ON pi.product_id = po.product_id AND pi.lot_no = po.lot_no WHERE p.product_name IN ('돼지국밥', '순대국밥', '한우곰탕') GROUP BY pi.product_id, p.product_name, pi.lot_no, pi.reg_date ) sub WHERE sub.stock_qty = 0 AND sub.rn = 1 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM product_inbound pi2 JOIN product p2 ON pi2.product_id = p2.product_id LEFT JOIN product_outbound po2 ON pi2.product_id = po2.product_id AND pi2.lot_no = po2.lot_no WHERE p2.product_name = sub.product_name GROUP BY pi2.product_id, pi2.lot_no HAVING GREATEST(SUM(COALESCE(pi2.inbound_qty,0)) - SUM(COALESCE(po2.outbound_qty,0)), 0) > 0 ) ) AS total
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_stock (product_id, lot_no, stock_qty, safe_qty, reg_date) VALUES (#{productId}, #{lotNo}, #{qty}, 50, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE stock_qty = stock_qty + #{qty}
